site.title: Itsinda Mpuzamahanga Rishinzwe Gufasha Abantu Kubigeraho
site.tagline: Guhera ku gukenera kugera kuri repo rusange
nav.label: Icyiciro cya mbere
hero.home.eyebrow: Kwinjira mu buryo bw'ibikoresho by'ikoranabuhanga rya Open Source
meta.home.description: IATF ihindura ibyifuzo nyabyo byo kuboneka mububiko bw'isoko rusange.
meta.projects.description: Shakisha imishinga yo kugera kuri rubanda yashyizwe ahagaragara binyuze muri IATF.
meta.propose.description: Saba umushinga wo kugera kuri IATF ukoresheje urubuga, imeri, cyangwa Discord.
meta.governance.description: Soma uko IATF yemera imishinga, igenzura ububiko, kandi igakomeza akazi rusange.
meta.join.description: Uburyo bwo kwitabira IATF: gutanga kode, guhindura, kugerageza, cyangwa kubungabunga umushinga.
meta.accessibility.description: Uko IATF yifuza ko uru rubuga rwakomeza kugera kuri bose n'uburyo bwo gutanga raporo y'inzitizi zo kugera kuri uru rubuga.
meta.transparency.description: Inyandiko rusange za IATF: ibyemezo, imishinga, no kuvugurura bikomeza gufungurwa byanze bikunze.
registry.empty.title: Kugeza ubu nta mishinga yashyizwe ahagaragara
registry.empty.body: IATF irimo gutegura igishushanyo mbonera cyayo cya mbere.
proposal.form.title: Kohereza icyifuzo
proposal.form.body: Uzuza urupapuro ruri hasi kugira ngo wohereze icyifuzo IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript irakenewe kugirango ukoreshe iyi fomu y'urubuga. Niba itaboneka, koresha imeri cyangwa Discord.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Gutanga Live ntabwo byashyizweho muri uru rwego. Iyi fomu izafungura umukiriya wawe wa imeri.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Gutegura uburyo bwo gutanga amakuru mu buryo bufite umutekano...
proposal.form.ready: Igihe wohereje icyifuzo, IATF izakora inyandiko yo kwakira.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Nyamuneka ujye wuzuza igenzura ryo kurinda spam mbere yo kohereza.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kwirinda inyandiko zitakenewe byararangiye. Nyamuneka ongera ukore igenzura mbere yo kohereza.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kurinda inyandiko zitari ngombwa ntibishobora kwemezwa ubu. Ongera ugerageze.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Igihe cyo kurinda ubutumwa butari ngombwa cyararangiye. Ongera ugerageze igenzura.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Nyamuneka wuzuze imirima isabwa mbere yo kohereza.
proposal.form.success: Twishimiye ko twumvise ibyo wasabye, kandi tugiye kubisuzuma.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Niba wongeye kuvugana na IATF kuri iki cyifuzo, shyiraho umurongo ukurikira.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Hari ikitagenda neza mugihe cyo kohereza icyifuzo. Wongeye kugerageza. Niba ikibazo gikomeje, koresha imeri.
project.detail.problemTitle: Ni ikihe kibazo uyu mushinga ugiye gukemura
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Umwandiko w'umwimerere w'icyongereza, ubuhinduzi bushobora kongerwa nyuma
footer.label: Ikirenge cy'urubuga
footer.blurb: Ibikorwa byo kugera ku bantu byagombye korohera gutangira, byoroshye gutangaza, kandi byoroshye gukomeza gufungura.
footer.source: Icyerekezo cy'amahame agenga uburyo bwo kugera ku bantu: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/). Imikorere yatangajwe n'abakoresha ikoranabuhanga rifasha.
contact.label: Ibyagufasha
translation.label: Imimerere y'ubuhinduzi
translation.source: Icyongereza ni ururimi rwemewe rw'uru rubuga.
translation.humanReviewed: Iyo Bibiliya yasubiwemo n'umuntu uzi kuvuga neza.
translation.machineAssisted: Ubu buhinduzi bwatewe inkunga n'imashini kandi ntabwo bwasuzumwe byuzuye n'umuvugizi uvuga neza. Ibitekerezo birakirwa binyuze kuri GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Ubu buhinduzi bwongeye gusuzumwa mbere yo kuvugurura inyandiko y'icyongereza iheruka kandi bishobora gukenera kuvugururwa.
